calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-12-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Marc A. Centor, Esq. of Cox Wootton Griffin Hansen & Poulos LLP, Tel. 415.438.4600, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Prior to the hearing, plaintiff provided the court with a proof of service showing that the other defendants were timely served. Therefore, the court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND/OR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Set For Trial On Feb-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Continued To Aug-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Change Of Venue;
Off Calendar Jun-21-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARC T. CEFALU OF COX, WOOTON, GRIFFIN, & POULOS, LLP, TEL. NO. 438-4600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. AURORA TALAVERA OF THE AURORA LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (213)223-2085 APPEARING FOR THE DEENDANT HYVAGYSS, INCORPORATED BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS HYVAGYSS, INC., DBA ROSEDALE CLEANERS, ARA BASMAJIAN, YEPREM SATAMIAN AND SYLVA SATAMIAN'S Motion For Change Of Venue IS Denied. The weight of the evidence shows that the contracts were executed in and to be performed in San Francisco. A convenience of witnesses motion is premature. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
